data.name: 5GDeployment Planner
data.description: Plans 5G network deployments by analyzing coverage requirements, site availability, backhaul connectivity, and equipment specifications to generate optimal site selection and configuration plans.
data.readme:
## 5GDeployment Planner

Plans 5G network deployments by analyzing coverage requirements, site availability, backhaul connectivity, and equipment specifications to generate optimal site selection and configuration plans.

### Framework: Agno

### Tools
["Coverage Modeler","Site Selector","Backhaul Planner"]

### Tags
["5g","deployment","coverage","planning"]
data.author: TelecommunicationsAI Labs
